extortion.description: Davis & Davis Company specializes in providing products and systems for Oil, Natural Gas, and Liquid Measurement. Established in 1941, the company offers technical sales support and a wide range of measurement controls and instrumentation, including flow meters and control valves. Their intended clients include those in the energy sector, specifically targeting companies involved in natural gas and oil production. Davis & Davis is committed to enhancing accuracy and efficiency in measurement technology ===> Revenue: $5 Million Industry: Manufacturing Data:60GB Phone Number:  (303) 935-4694 Brian -     307-315-7277 Cheryle -     303-548-3151 Dan -         303-949-7518 Daniel Davis - 435-790-3093 Estevan -     303-667-8390 Greg -         303-898-7699 Jesse -     720-217-1327 Jon -         406-672-9589 Kris Ann -     720-690-6417 Kylee -        720-427-2628 Martin -     720-355-6723 Matt -       303-882-6108
